summary: Completed testing for Messages page Notes UI features: NoteBubble positioning (Instagram-style ON avatar), CreateNoteModal with emoji picker (12 surf emojis), and avatar cache-busting with other_user_updated_at. All 6 backend tests passed. Frontend verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: NoteBubble component (MessagesPage.js lines 458-514) correctly uses -top-1 -left-1 positioning for Instagram-style notes ON avatar
Add note (+) button positioned at -top-1 -left-1 when no note exists (line 487)
CreateNoteModal (lines 517-616) has emoji picker with data-testid='note-emoji-picker'
ConversationResponse model includes other_user_updated_at field (messages.py line 177)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messages page Notes UI matches Profile page style - notes positioned ON avatar top-left corner using -top-1 -left-1 classes. CreateNoteModal has emoji picker with 12 surf emojis. Avatar caching fixed by adding other_user_updated_at to ConversationResponse and using it as cache-bust param in avatar URLs.

note_bubble_positioning.add_note_button_position: PASS - absolute -top-1 -left-1 z-10 (ON avatar top-left when no note)

avatar_cache_busting.frontend_usage: PASS - ConversationItem uses v=${conversation.other_user_updated_at} in avatar URL (line 718)

code_verification.messages_page_note_bubble: Lines 476-482: Note bubble positioned at -top-1 -left-1 (ON avatar)
